item.title: Provider registry hardcodes API base URLs despite constants existing in defaults.ts
item.intent: evolve/provider/registry.ts imports ANTHROPIC_API_BASE and OPENAI_API_BASE from config/defaults.ts. No literal API base URLs remain in that file.
item.description: src/evolve/provider/registry.ts:20,29 hardcodes baseUrl: 'https://api.anthropic.com' and baseUrl: 'https://api.openai.com' as string literals. Both constants ANTHROPIC_API_BASE and OPENAI_API_BASE are already defined and exported from src/config/defaults.ts (added by BUG-030). The registry simply doesn't import them. This is the same pattern BUG-044 fixed for telegram.ts (TELEGRAM_API_BASE). Steps: (1) verify ANTHROPIC_API_BASE and OPENAI_API_BASE are exported from src/config/defaults.ts; (2) import both in src/evolve/provider/registry.ts; (3) replace the two hardcoded baseUrl string literals with the constants; (4) run evolve/ tests. Scope: 2 files, ~4 lines changed. Zero logic change.
